steps.title: Interpret the function form
steps.content: The model $f(x) = 42 - 0.25x$ is linear in $x$, the number of days after the start. The constant term $42$ is the $y$-intercept, the value when $x = 0$.

steps.title: Evaluate at the start of the project
steps.content:
At $x = 0$ days: $f(0) = 42 - 0.25(0) = 42$ cm.

So $42$ is the estimated height of the liquid at the start of the project. The other constant, $-0.25$, is the per-day rate of change (a separate quantity).

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A. Height at the start: matches $f(0) = 42$.
  • B. Height at the end: the problem gives no end date, and the height changes over time, so $42$ doesn't represent an ending height.
  • C. Daily change in height: that's $-0.25$ cm/day, not $42$.
  • D. Days for the liquid to fully evaporate: solving $42 - 0.25x = 0$ gives $x = 168$ days, not $42$.
That matches Choice A — The estimated height, in cm, of the liquid at the start of the project.
